The options are A) 11am to 1pm, B) 8am to 11am, C) 7am to 8am, D) 1pm to 9pm. Let me break this down step by step. So he couldn't have gone to the bookstore then. From 8am to 11am, Leslie saw him at the cafe. So he was there during that time. So option B is when he was at the cafe. Therefore, he couldn't have gone to the bookstore during B's time. So the only time he wasn't doing anything is between when? He was at the cafe until 11am.
